title: Use EIP-1153 transient storage (tload/tstore) for cross-call signaling within a single transaction
description: Transient storage (EIP-1153) is per-transaction storage that costs only 100 gas per access (vs 2100/20000 cold/warm SSTORE). Cleared automatically at end of transaction. Perfect for cross-call signals like proxy initialization requests, reentrancy locks, or temporary auth flags. Requires Cancun EVM or later.
when_to_apply: Cross-call signals within a single transaction — proxy init, reentrancy guards, transient auth scopes. Requires Cancun EVM
when_not_to_apply: Pre-Cancun chains (EVM version < cancun), data that must persist across transactions
